description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a manicured lawn and several mature trees. The structure features large windows and glass doors, especially prominent on the side facing the garden, allowing for ample natural light. A paved driveway leads to a carport or garage area, and a sidewalk runs parallel to the street in front. The property is enclosed by a low fence, with a small gate providing access to the front yard. There is a visible patio or outdoor seating area, partially shaded by trees and adjacent to the main building. The landscaping includes a mix of green grass, flowering shrubs, and ornamental trees, contributing to a suburban residential feel.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and a patio. The property is enclosed by a low fence and features a driveway and sidewalk.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rear garden, patio area, and the carport or garage at the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the front yard, fence, and the main entrance facing the street.
description_view_3: Frontal view from the street, showing the main entrance, sidewalk, and a car parked in front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
